backend/main.mo: Minimal Motoko backend actor with no methods or state defined.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting the Hero section redesign feature, linking it to Hero.tsx, relevant components, and test requirement REQ-4.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-line summaries of every frontend source file, describing each component's purpose and content.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS entry file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark theme tokens (colors, radius, sidebar, charts).
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the React app, mounting the app into a root div and loading main.tsx as a module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that composes all page sections—Navbar, Hero, TrustBar, ServicesGrid, YouthGroupHomes, HorseAndAnimalInteractions, AdultDayProgramming, Standards, Gallery, ContactSection, and Footer—into a full-page layout.
frontend/src/components/AdultDayProgramm: React section component for Adult Day Programming featuring Morning and Afternoon session tabs with activity lists and icons using shadcn Tabs.
frontend/src/components/ContactSection.t: Dark-themed contact section with a controlled form (name, address, phone, message) and a success state, plus a contact info column with location, phone, and email.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Multi-column dark footer with brand logo, social media icon links, Services/Programs/Join Our Mission link columns, copyright, and a caffeine.ai attribution.
frontend/src/components/Gallery.tsx: A paginated image gallery section displaying care facility photos with captions and location labels, supporting prev/next navigation showing 3 items at a time.
frontend/src/components/Hero.tsx: Full-viewport hero section with a background image, headline, subtitle, CTA buttons, and stat badges (24/7 support, certified staff, location) for the Reliance Care landing page.
frontend/src/components/HorseAndAnimalIn: A two-column section showcasing the horse and animal interaction program with stacked images on the left and descriptive text plus a staff quote on the right.
frontend/src/components/Navbar.tsx: Sticky top navigation bar with desktop links and a mobile hamburger menu, including a 'Get Started' CTA button linking to the contact section.
frontend/src/components/ServicesGrid.tsx: A 3-column grid section listing six care services (Respite, Adult Day, Community Activities, Vocational Rehab, Transport, On-Call Nurse) each with an icon, description, and link.
frontend/src/components/Standards.tsx: A four-card section highlighting the organization's care standards: CPI Training, PPE Certification, CANS Assessment, and Medical Oversight.
frontend/src/components/TrustBar.tsx: A horizontal trust/accreditation bar displaying four certification badges (Ohio Dept of Health, CPI Certified, DODD Accredited, CANS Assessment) with icons.
A full-width banner section promoting the 2025 Youth Group Homes and Emergency Respite expansion, featuring bullet points, descriptive text, and a CTA button alongside a background image.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A React hook that creates and caches an Internet Computer actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing login state, identity persistence, and AuthClient creation with configurable options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Placeholder module with no backend queries, exported as an empty module for a static landing page.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that imports Google Fonts, sets up Tailwind base/components/utilities, and defines CSS custom properties for the brand color palette in both light and dark modes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that mounts the root component wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom brand colors (oklch), typography, border radius, box shadows, animations, and enabling typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state metadata file tracking schema version, feature definitions, architectural notes, and image requirements for a healthcare community care landing page.
